'''jofaraka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubbish|rubbish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-f-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubbish|rubbish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jofaraka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jofarithi|jofarithi]] || [[word:jofariji|jofariji]] || [[word:jofarishi|jofarishi]] || [[word:jofariki|jofariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jofaruthuthu|jofaruthuthu]] || [[word:jofarujuju|jofarujuju]] || [[word:jofarushushu|jofarushushu]] || [[word:jofarukuku|jofarukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jofaruthu|jofaruthu]] || [[word:jofaruju|jofaruju]] || [[word:jofarushu|jofarushu]] || [[word:jofaruku|jofaruku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jofarufthuf|jofarufthuf]] || [[word:jofarufjuf|jofarufjuf]] || [[word:jofarufshuf|jofarufshuf]] || [[word:jofarufkuf|jofarufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jofarethe|jofarethe]] || [[word:jofareje|jofareje]] || [[word:jofareshe|jofareshe]] || [[word:jofareke|jofareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jofarothotho|jofarothotho]] || [[word:jofarojojo|jofarojojo]] || [[word:jofaroshosho|jofaroshosho]] || [[word:jofarokoko|jofarokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jofarotho|jofarotho]] || [[word:jofarojo|jofarojo]] || [[word:jofarosho|jofarosho]] || [[word:jofaroko|jofaroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jofarofthof|jofarofthof]] || [[word:jofarofjof|jofarofjof]] || [[word:jofarofshof|jofarofshof]] || [[word:jofarofkof|jofarofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jofarÃŸfthÃŸf|jofarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jofarÃŸfjÃŸf|jofarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jofarÃŸfshÃŸf|jofarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jofarÃŸfkÃŸf|jofarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jofarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|jofarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jofarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|jofarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jofarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|jofarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jofarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|jofarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jofarÃŸfthÃŸf|jofarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jofarÃŸfjÃŸf|jofarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jofarÃŸfshÃŸf|jofarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jofarÃŸfkÃŸf|jofarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jofarÃŸfthÃŸf|jofarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jofarÃŸfjÃŸf|jofarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jofarÃŸfshÃŸf|jofarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jofarÃŸfkÃŸf|jofarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jofarÃḊthÃḊ|jofarÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:jofarÃḊjÃḊ|jofarÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:jofarÃḊshÃḊ|jofarÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:jofarÃḊkÃḊ|jofarÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jofarathatha|jofarathatha]] || [[word:jofarajaja|jofarajaja]] || [[word:jofarashasha|jofarashasha]] || [[word:jofarakaka|jofarakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jofaratha|jofaratha]] || [[word:jofaraja|jofaraja]] || [[word:jofarasha|jofarasha]] || [[word:jofaraka|jofaraka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jofarafthaf|jofarafthaf]] || [[word:jofarafjaf|jofarafjaf]] || [[word:jofarafshaf|jofarafshaf]] || [[word:jofarafkaf|jofarafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:jofarasha|jofarasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:jofarshÃḋsha|jofarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jofarosha|jofarosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jofarmusha|jofarmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:jofaryasha|jofaryasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojofarnkshÃḋsha|gojofarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojofarnkrosha|gojofarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojofarnkmusha|gojofarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojofarnkyasha|gojofarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:jofafarasha|jofafarasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jofafarshÃḋsha|jofafarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jofafarosha|jofafarosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jofafarmusha|jofafarmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jofafaryasha|jofafaryasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojofafarnkshÃḋsha|gojofafarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojofafarnkrosha|gojofafarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojofafarnkmusha|gojofafarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojofafarnkyasha|gojofafarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:jefÃḊrasha|jefÃḊrasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jefÃḊrshÃḋsha|jefÃḊrshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jefÃḊrosha|jefÃḊrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jefÃḊrmusha|jefÃḊrmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jefÃḊryasha|jefÃḊryasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojefÃḊrnkshÃḋsha|gojefÃḊrnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojefÃḊrnkrosha|gojefÃḊrnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojefÃḊrnkmusha|gojefÃḊrnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojefÃḊrnkyasha|gojefÃḊrnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:jofarasha|jofarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jofarshÃḋsha|jofarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jofarosha|jofarosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jofarmusha|jofarmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jofaryasha|jofaryasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojofarnkshÃḋsha|gojofarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojofarnkrosha|gojofarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojofarnkmusha|gojofarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojofarnkyasha|gojofarnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
